testcase.name: testGetUser_ValidId_Success

failure.message: Add user should succeed: Lỗi hệ thống: Lỗi kiểm tra tồn tại: Access denied for user 'root'@'localhost' (using password: YES) ==> expected: <true> but was: <false>

testcase.name: testListUsers_InactiveFilter

failure.message: Update to inactive should succeed: Lỗi hệ thống: Lỗi khi tìm user: Access denied for user 'root'@'localhost' (using password: YES) ==> expected: <true> but was: <false>

testcase.name: testAddUser_ValidInput_Success

failure.message: Add user should succeed. Error: Lỗi hệ thống: Lỗi kiểm tra tồn tại: Access denied for user 'root'@'localhost' (using password: YES) ==> expected: <true> but was: <false>

testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: Add user should succeed.
